utterance_pair.utterance: I'm looking for an inexpensive Indian restaurant in the northern part of Cambridge, and by the way, I recently read about the history of the Cambridge University Press, which is the oldest publishing house in the world, established in 1534. Can you help me find a place to eat?
Thanks for recognizing it! Have you found any guesthouses in the north with free parking that fit my criteria? What is the oldest university in Cambridge?
Please confirm the booking and provide the reference number. Thanks for the info. Do you think trying street food in Cambridge would be a good way to experience the local culture?
